title: Quick Switch
description: Effortlessly switch/join servers no matter where you are (any world or server), with a command!
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️** This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
**Mod Description** _Ever wanted to join a server from anywhere, straight from chat with a command? Well you just came to the right place!_ **Quick Switch** is a client-sided Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that allows users to join **any** server from **anywhere** (from world, or another server), by running a command. To join a server with this mod, simply run: **/quickswitch ** (worlds **will save** before joining a server). For example, if you wanted to join Hypixel, you would run the command like this:
/quickswitch hypixel.net
This mod also has another command: **/quickswitch:disconnect**, which, when run, makes you leave the current world or server. For a visual of this mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or visit this mod's screenshots in the **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/quick-switch/gallery)**.
**Mod Demonstration Video**
**Why Download?** As a pose of leaving a server/world, then selecting & playing a server, simply running a command from anywhere to join one could save a few clicks.
**Donation** If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate [here](https://paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov) (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
